steps.t: Melynis has given the deciphered scroll to Rhiangar, who is waiting to speak with you. Rhiangar is among the circled caravans, in northern Cardolan.
Rhiangar has suggested that you read the deciphered scroll which is on a bench next to her in the caravan south of Andrath. You should talk to Rhianga…
Rhiangar is waiting to speak with you among the circled caravans, in northern Cardolan.
